evals.prompt: I need to prepare for a job interview at Stripe for a Senior Product Manager role. I have my resume, the job description, and I want to do comprehensive preparation including researching the company, tailoring my resume, preparing STAR stories, and practicing interview questions. Create an execution plan.
evals.expected_output: A detailed execution plan mapping available skills to each preparation task with confidence scores and sequencing
expectations: Output discovers and lists available skills before planning
Output maps specific skills to each task (e.g., deep-research for company research, resume-tailor for resume, interview-prep-generator for practice)
Output provides confidence scores for each skill-to-task match
Output sequences the tasks in a logical order
Output presents the plan and asks for user approval before proceeding

evals.prompt: I want to build a comprehensive market entry strategy for a B2B SaaS product targeting mid-market healthcare companies. I need competitive analysis, ICP definition, GTM strategy, and a product roadmap framework. Orchestrate the best resources to help me.
evals.expected_output: An orchestrated execution plan using multiple strategy-related skills with clear task assignments and alternatives
expectations: Output identifies relevant skills for each component (mckinsey-strategist, abx-strategy, product-strategy, product-architecture, etc.)
Output includes confidence scoring for each resource match
Output provides primary and alternative execution paths
Output generates a structured plan covering all four requested areas
Output waits for approval before executing the plan
